# SheTech Explorer

> SheTech Explorer is the public program site for SheTech—a Women Tech Council initiative that helps high school girls discover pathways in STEM through hands-on events, mentorship, internships, and year-round programming in Utah and surrounding regions.

SheTech connects students, educators, and technology employers so girls can explore careers in technology with support from industry role models and real-world experiences.

## Primary audience

- High school girls interested in STEM and technology careers
- Teachers and schools registering students for programs
- Companies and volunteers supporting mentorship, internships, and sponsorship

## Key pages

- [Home](https://shetechexplorer.com/)
- [SheTech Explorer Day (students)](https://shetechexplorer.com/students/explorer-day)
- [Student Board / Leadership](https://shetechexplorer.com/students/leadership-board)
- [Summer Internship](https://shetechexplorer.com/students/summer-internship)
- [Media Internship (TechBuzz)](https://shetechexplorer.com/students/media-internship)
- [Scholarships](https://shetechexplorer.com/students/scholarships)
- [Register your students (teachers)](https://shetechexplorer.com/teachers/register-your-students)
- [Why participate (teachers)](https://shetechexplorer.com/teachers/why-participate)
- [Host / sponsor / mentor / volunteer (companies)](https://shetechexplorer.com/companies/sponsor)
- [About Women Tech Council](https://shetechexplorer.com/about/about-women-tech-council)
- [Sponsors & partners](https://shetechexplorer.com/about/sponsors)
- [Contact](https://shetechexplorer.com/about/contact-us)
- [FAQ](https://shetechexplorer.com/faq)
- [Privacy policy](https://shetechexplorer.com/privacy-policy)

## Organization

SheTech is presented by the **Women Tech Council**. General program inquiries: shetech@womentechcouncil.com.
